title: Streetwear Character Fashion Drop AI
sourceTitle: Streetwear Character Fashion Drop AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a full-body 3D stylized original anthropomorphic arctic fox character in a polished fashion-editorial render. The fox has soft white fur and a confident relaxed expression. outfit: oversized coral hoodie, graphite cargo pants, cream chunky sneakers, reflective visor sunglasses, thin silver chain. pose: standing centered with one hand in pocket and one hand holding hoodie drawstring. background: minimal solid warm coral studio background. character: an original full-body anthropomorphic arctic fox character with soft white fur and confident expression. render style: premium stylized 3D animation render, detailed fur and fabric, soft studio lighting.
imagePrompts.title: Fashion Drop Fox Coral

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a full-body stylized 3D character in a clean fashion drop render, swapping character, outfit, colorway, and pose while preserving studio product clarity. theme: A reusable streetwear character fashion drop built around friendly 3D travel planner avatar with orange backpack and camera strap. composition: stable composition, clear focal subject, organized supporting elements, balanced negative space, and no clutter. style: Premium 3D rendered or sculptural visual language with crisp materials, depth, clean lighting, and polished commercial finish. render style: clean collectible-character render with tactile clothing materials and crisp shadow. restrictions: no watermark, no random extra text, no distorted anatomy, no copied copyrighted composition, avoid real logos and replace brands with fictional or generic marks when publishing subject: friendly 3D travel planner avatar with orange backpack and camera strap as the primary visual subject, kept clear and recognizable while the template style remains stable outfit: cropped olive bomber jacket, ivory utility skirt, black platform boots, tiny enamel pins. pose: relaxed contrapposto pose, one foot forward, both hands adjusting jacket collar. scene: matte olive studio backdrop with soft floor shadow defines the surrounding context, supporting details, and sense of place color palette: controlled neon accents with deep cinematic contrast lighting: lighting supports the template mood with controlled highlights, readable details, and no overexposed glow materials: specific material surfaces, reflections, texture, and product-grade finish remain legible Keep the visual style consistent with the template while changing only the listed variables.
